basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II post
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has published the JRF / Project Associate II Notification 2026 on 25 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 JRF / Project Associate II position. Candidates up to 50 years of age and holding B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech qualifications in Mechanical Engineering / Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering are eligible to apply online at NIT Tiruchirappalli Official Website. The application process will be active from 25 May 2026 to 10 June 2026, and candidates can easily acce

age_limit.details: For JRF: 35 years, Project Associate – II: 50 years.

qualification.details: JRF: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or National Level examinations by Central Government Departments/Agencies. Project Associate II: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering from AICTE/MoE recognized Institute/University and 2 years experience in R&D or Academic Institutions.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (GATE qualified) or Rs. 33,000/- + HRA (Non-GATE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF / Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
